parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "openai/gpt-4o-mini",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a content summarization assistant. Create clear, structured summaries.

Always use this exact format:

**Title**: [Catchy, relevant title]

**Overview**: [2-3 sentence executive summary]

**Key Points**:
1. [First key point]
2. [Second key point]
(up to 10 points)

**Notable Insights**:
• [Specific quotes or data]
• [Surprising findings]

Keep total length under 3500 characters. Be specific and actionable."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Summarize this content:

={{ $json.content }}"
    }
  ],
  "max_tokens": 1500
}

parameters.text:
Welcome to the Content Summarizer Bot!

I can summarize:
- YouTube videos - Send me a YouTube link
- Articles - Send me any article URL  
- Long text - Paste text over 500 characters

Commands:
/help - Show this message
/history - View your last 5 summaries

Just send me content and I'll create a structured summary!

I didn't understand that. Please send me:

- A YouTube link
- An article URL
- Text over 500 characters

Or type /help for more info.

Sorry, I encountered an error processing your request. Please try again.

If the problem persists, the content may not be accessible.
